source.observed_pattern: Use a vendor-neutral collector to receive, process, and export telemetry through explicit receivers, processors, exporters, connectors, and extensions.

collector_pipeline_candidate.receiver: filelog or equivalent operator-owned file shipper
collector_pipeline_candidate.reason: The workspace can prove payload shape locally, but live collector runtime, network export, and credential handling must be owned by the operator.

ab_contract.baseline: OTLP JSONL existed as a local file-exporter shaped artifact, but there was no executable handoff check before a collector integration.
ab_contract.variant: Validate the generated OTLP JSONL against an operator-owned collector handoff contract while keeping live collector shipping disabled.
ab_contract.primary_kpi: A real MCP smoke OTLP artifact validates as handoff-ready with zero schema or required-attribute errors.
ab_contract.decision_rule: Adopt the handoff validator only if it passes against the real MCP smoke artifact and the completion audit still marks live collector shipping as future-scoped.
